# VIVIM - Sovereign, Portable, Personal AI Memory

## Overview

VIVIM is a revolutionary AI memory layer that provides intelligent context management, persistent memory, and semantic storage. It works with all AI providers to give your AI a brain that never forgets.

## Core Features

- **Sovereign**: You own your memory data completely
- **Portable**: Export your memory anytime in standard formats  
- **Personal**: Your memory is yours alone
- **Context Management**: Intelligent management of AI context windows
- **Semantic Storage**: Advanced memory storage with semantic understanding
- **ACU (Atomic Chat Units)**: Revolutionary unit for measuring context usage

## Technical Details

- **Framework**: Next.js 15 (App Router)
- **Language**: TypeScript
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS 4 + CSS Variables
- **Animations**: Framer Motion
- **Components**: shadcn/ui (Radix UI)
- **Runtime**: Bun

## Use Cases

1. **Live Memory Demo**: Watch memory extraction in action
2. **Context Engine Demo**: See context assembly in real-time
3. **Developer Integration**: Add memory to any AI application
4. **Personal AI Assistant**: Give your AI persistent memory

## API / Integration

VIVIM provides APIs for:
- Memory storage and retrieval
- Context window optimization
- Semantic search across memories
- Export in standard formats (JSON, markdown)

## Links

- Website: https://vivim.live
- GitHub: https://github.com/owenservera/vivim-live
- Discord: https://discord.gg/vivim

Your memory. Your rules. Everywhere.
